textByHashes.179ee9aacc85d61857a8204a56013339da68ad74: Welcome to the Emir's Arena! Are you interested in 1v1 Tournaments? We organise ranked Tournaments here, or alternatively you can organise your own unranked Tournaments.
textByHashes.8190f3ed3efeb64e6247654207d84fdf70b7cdcc: A group of fighters is divided into pairs of opponents, and they all fight their opponent. The winners of those fights proceed to the next round, where they're divided into pairs, and they each fight their new opponent.
textByHashes.0128e94e38326164ad4b3171b303981fed993817: The number of surviving fighters is halved each time, until eventually only one person is left standing. They're the winner of the Tournament.
textByHashes.8fe15c67fe8edc807c4c5a4b8d0a641b7d356d1d: Everyone has a rank. It's meant to indicate how good they are at fighting, compared to other people.
textByHashes.10d544d9f674ee3d57556c71f8d5fe6ff46883e0: In ranked fights, the winners gain rank and the losers lose rank. The Arena staff will decide who'll be fighting in each ranked Tournament, and send the invitations.
textByHashes.70e979e1dfd1a12a24bc44b6cfba145beaab5634: But if you just want some casual fun, you can have an unranked Tournament, where no-one gains or loses rank. You can organise your own unranked Tournament, and decide for yourself who'll fight in it.
textByHashes.4285a356426d608541ebc1b2e077ef43e92f26fe: Only the ranked fights offer access to the other rewards of the Arena.
textByHashes.d1030bf374818e9164fac885ff0bf38b422bf842: You'll need to sign up to a recruitment group...
textByHashes.865f7df05c8a272250d7e7bfbe26c4e1c4808ad4: You can carry on with your adventures while you're waiting for a Tournament to begin, since it may be a while before suitable fighters are available.
textByHashes.3148dcfe989209d1deaa21db94ee40950fdca096: Just use my Recruitment Board here to form your own recruitment group. Once you've got one, wait for other fighters to join it.
